name: Married Soukoku Au | Chuuya Pov | soft mornings~
description: Soft mornings where Osamu wakes first just to hold Chuuya a little longer, quiet apartments filled with sunlight and sleepy affection, teasing that hides years of love, and the rare tenderness shared between two people who know each other better than anyone else ever could.
creator: aloofkingfisher88356
